column1: # term: φιλοστοργ- family (noun φιλοστοργία, adj φιλόστοργος, adv φιλοστόργως, verb φιλοστοργέω, privative ἀφιλόστοργος)
# discovery: philostorgia_corpus.json occurrences (sid=units.id); 368 distinct units from 411 tokens

# grounding query (live DB, 2026-07-19): SELECT u.id sid,u.eul_wid wid,u.ref,a.eul_aid,a.name_english author,a.affiliation,a.period,COALESCE(w.domain,a.domain) domain,COALESCE(w.format,a.format) format,a.fl_from,a.fl_to,w.title_english,char_length(u.text_greek) length FROM eulogikon.units u JOIN eulogikon.works w ON w.eul_wid=u.eul_wid JOIN eulogikon.authors a ON a.eul_aid=w.eul_aid WHERE u.id=ANY(ARRAY[<368 sids>]) ORDER BY a.fl_from,a.eul_aid,u.eul_wid,u.sequence_num;
# drift check vs discovery: 368/368 sids resolve; 0 wid/ref mismatches
# NOTE token_count = discovery token count from JSON (grc_fold path blocked in read-only MCP); attestation is the row, not the count.
